matches.match_rationale: Multi-step workflow spanning allocation rules, transfer governance, and cross-campus reconciliation.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An agent applying campus-demand weighting rules, monitoring transfers, and writing allocation records.

matches.match_rationale: Duplicate posting risk is a textbook anomaly detection problem.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A real-time anomaly detector monitoring financial aid posting events across all campuses.

matches.match_rationale: Distributing group scholarships subject to enrollment demand and sponsor conditions is a constraint satisfaction problem.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A constraint solver outputting recommended cross-campus allocation satisfying all constraints.

matches.match_rationale: Text generation can synthesize cross-campus allocation data into sponsor responses.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A report generator producing sponsor-facing allocation summaries on demand.
